---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for Essentials
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem

What limitation or friction does this address?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the proposed behavior, user flow, or API shape.

## Why It Fits Essentials

Explain why this belongs in the core runtime instead of adding unnecessary surface area.

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler or narrower alternatives you considered.

## Additional Context

Add examples, sketches, or related links if helpful.
